page_summary: A page showing a column of large-number factorizations displayed as fractions on the left, with a black ink-blot drawing of standing stone-like figures (resembling moai statues) at the bottom right.

symbols.description: Multiplication sign (×) and superscript 2 used as exponent throughout the factorizations

decorations.description: A rough black ink-blot drawing of a group of standing monolithic figures, resembling a row of moai (Easter Island statues) of varying heights, with a larger central figure that has a distinct head with what looks like eyes and a mouth
components: a tall central figure with a clearly defined head featuring eye and mouth shapes
several narrower, taller standing figures flanking the center
two small stubby figures on the far left of the group
rough stippled/splattered ink texture giving a stone-like appearance

uncertain_or_unreadable: Some of the larger numbers in the factorizations may contain transcription errors due to image resolution.
